status.noFavoritesDetail: Add favorites by tapping the heart on any game card, or browse all titles.

actions.surprise: Surprise me — pick a random game

achievements.title: RetroAchievements
achievements.noRecentAchievements: No recent achievements found. Play some games!

history.title: Play History
history.startTracking: Play a game to start tracking your history.

activity.trend: Games played — this week vs last

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoSaved: Settings are saved automatically to the local database.

connection.title: Home Assistant Connection
connection.description: Configure how HomeArcade talks to your Home Assistant instance. Use the internal URL if this is running as an add-on.

display.title: Global Preferences
display.description: Default settings that apply to all games unless overridden.

overrides.title: Per-System Overrides
overrides.description: Customize display settings for specific consoles. These apply when launching a game.

automation.title: PC Status Monitoring
automation.description: Link Home Assistant entities to the dashboard meters for CPU, RAM, and Online status.

endpoints.title: Webhook Endpoints
endpoints.description: URLs automatically generated for your Home Assistant automations. Copy these to use as Webhook triggers.

input.title: Input Preferences
input.description: Configure global behavior for controllers and keyboards.

controllers.title: Connected Controllers
controllers.description: Detect and test gamepads connected to this device. Press buttons to see them light up.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Global hotkeys for navigating the interface without a mouse.

mapping.title: UI Navigation Mapping
mapping.description: Remap the buttons used for navigating the HomeArcade interface.

smartFilters.title: Smart filter collections
smartFilters.description: Collections that auto-populate based on rules — system, play status, rating, or playtime. They update whenever your library changes.

scanner.title: ROM scanner
scanner.enabledDescription: Auto-imports new ROM files found in the watched folder every 60 seconds.
scanner.disabledDescription: Auto-import ROMs dropped into a watched folder. Set CABINET_ROM_WATCH_DIR in your HA add-on environment to enable.

scrapers.title: Scraper Services
scrapers.description: Enter your credentials for online metadata and artwork providers.

retroachievements.title: RetroAchievements
retroachievements.description: Connect your account to track trophies and progress.

bulk.title: Bulk Actions
bulk.description: Process multiple ROMs at once. These operations can take several minutes.

health.title: System Health & Firmware
health.description: Manage BIOS and firmware files required for high-end console emulation.

kiosk.title: Kiosk Mode
kiosk.description: Lock the interface to a single collection and require a PIN to exit or enter settings.

help.title: Wiring Guide
help.description: Follow these steps to connect HomeArcade to your physical hardware using Home Assistant.

haBaseUrl.label: Base URL
haBaseUrl.hint: External or internal URL including port (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:8123)

haToken.label: Long-lived Access Token
haToken.hint: Required for certain actions, but often not needed for simple webhooks.

liveMode.label: Live Mode
liveMode.hint: When enabled, actions will fire real network requests to Home Assistant.
liveMode.notice: Cabinet is in Simulation Mode. Clicks will be logged in the activity panel but no webhooks will be fired. This is great for testing the UI without triggering hardware actions.

pcHostname.label: PC Hostname
pcHostname.hint: Shown at the top of the right panel.

pcOnline.label: Online Entity ID
pcOnline.hint: binary_sensor showing if PC is up.

systemLabels.label: System Labels
systemLabels.hint: Show or hide console names on game cards.

uiTheme.label: UI Theme
uiTheme.hint: Choose a visual style for the interface.

aspectRatio.label: Default Aspect Ratio
aspectRatio.hint: Used if no system-specific override is set.

shader.label: Default Shader
shader.hint: Global visual filter for the emulator.

kioskCollection.label: Target Collection
kioskCollection.hint: The only collection visible in Kiosk Mode.
